creator: kevinz5000@gmail.com
text:
Hi again,

The previous issue has been fixed by deleting the backup file during the
post-patch stage. Now, both audio/timidity and audio/guspat have been
successfully tested on RedPorts and work on actual computers.

Attached are the patch files against the existing version in FreeBSD
ports. This should be ready-to-commit.

Thanks,
Kevin Zheng
